allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add real-time PID tuning and velocity capture for shooter testing

Features added:
- Real-time motor PID tuning \(shooter & indexer\) via NetworkTables
- Real-time alignment PID tuning via NetworkTables
- Automatic velocity capture system \(300ms, 3 motors\) triggered on ball contact
- Shooter characterization test command with data logging
- Shoot-while-driving command with alignment control
- Comprehensive documentation \(PID tuning guide, test usage, system docs\)

Motor PID tuning prevents reconfiguration spam by only updating on value changes.
Velocity capture records all three shooter motors separately for analysis.
All changes synced with main branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
